name: Flow Like Moonshine

abilities.name: Tipsy Slide
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage, it may move up to 3". If this model has a friendly Poison token, it may remove it to increase the distance moved by +2".

actions.name: Drunken Fist
actions.effects: Remove a friendly Poison token from this model. This action treats all (r) flips as (c) flips. Place this model anywhere within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Tipsy Takedown
triggers.text: Move the target up to 4". If it is dealt falling damage, increase that damage by +1.

extraction_notes: The (r) and (c) suit symbols in the Drunken Fist action text refer to Rams and Crows respectively based on standard Malifaux iconography
